description: Golden coloured earringsTear drop shaped base with a pink coloured similarly shaped stone in the centre and rows of pearl like beads surrounding it Jhumka (bell shaped dangler) attached to it, pearl like beads at the intersection, green and pink stone design detail on top of the jhumka and pearl beads around it, pearl like beads dangling from the periphery of the jhumka, a pink tear drop shaped stone hanging from the centre of the jhumka Push back closure
